caption: A man and a woman are seated in wooden armchairs on a stage against a dark background featuring glowing purple neon lighting. The man has dark curly hair and a beard, wearing a white long-sleeved button-down shirt. The woman has blonde hair tied back and wears a dark t-shirt with the white text "WHO'S IN YOUR" visible across the chest. In front of them sits a complex piece of white electronic equipment. Throughout the sequence, the man remains mostly still, resting his hands in his lap. The woman is engaged in conversation, gesturing with her hands as she speaks. As the sequence progresses, she shifts her posture and hand movements, leaning forward slightly and moving her arms to emphasize her points while maintaining eye contact with the man. The lighting and the positioning of the subjects remain consistent across the frames.
